name: Education
description: Access to quality education, literacy rates, enrollment, STEM participation, and skills development for African youth aged 15-35.

name: Employment & Entrepreneurship
description: Youth employment, unemployment rates, labor force participation, entrepreneurship, self-employment, and informal sector engagement.

name: Health
description: Youth health outcomes including mortality, reproductive health, HIV/AIDS, mental health, healthcare access, and nutrition.

name: Civic Engagement & Governance
description: Youth participation in political processes, voter turnout, representation in government, civil society engagement, and policy influence.

name: Innovation & Technology
description: Digital connectivity, internet access, mobile penetration, digital skills, tech startups, and innovation ecosystem development.

name: Agriculture
description: Youth participation in agriculture, land access, agribusiness development, food security, and agricultural innovation.

name: Gender Equality
description: Gender parity in education, employment gaps, women's economic empowerment, GBV prevalence, and gender-responsive policy coverage.

name: Financial Inclusion
description: Access to banking, mobile money adoption, credit availability, savings rates, and financial literacy among youth.

name: Environment & Climate
description: Youth engagement in environmental action, climate change impact, green jobs, renewable energy access, and environmental education.
